role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant species (Eucalyptus) and soil types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road width, shoulders, and utility poles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Focused on infrastructure design details and image generation artifacts.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country. The agents provided consistent, image-grounded evidence (Eucalyptus, soil, poles) and the tournament logic was sound.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of eucalyptus, scrub, and reservoir match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified Eucalyptus globulus and scrub.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road and pole descriptions match image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Pole and manhole descriptions match image.
